steps.title: Turn the facts into points
steps.content: Use selling price as $x$ and demand as $y$. The two given points are $(40,20000)$ and $(60,15000)$.

steps.title: Find the line from the data
steps.content: Use the table points directly. From $(40,20000)$ to $(60,15000)$, the slope is $m=\frac{15000-20000}{60-40}=-250.$ Substituting a point into $y=mx+b$ gives $b=30000$.

steps.title: Evaluate the target price
steps.content: At a selling price of $55$ dollars, $$y=-250(55)+30000=16250.$$ The predicted demand is $16,250$ units, which matches Choice A — 16,250.
